content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad market is risk-on with strong sector breadth (pharma, FMCG, defense, capital goods, financials all green). Most existing holdings are in profit on today's tape. Several positions have SLs that need to be trailed up to lock in gains, and a few have catalysts (HAL board May 14, LUPIN Q4 today) requiring binary-event discipline.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24800,
      "nifty_resistance": 25200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 1056.70 vs entry 984 = +7.4%. Existing SL 1035 is already above entry locking in ~5% gain. Trail-gap discipline: SL 1035 vs CMP 1056.70 is ~2% below — adequate buffer. No change needed; emitting MODIFY only to acknowledge — actually switching to HOLD via position_actions to avoid no-op MODIFY."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 124.12 vs entry 125.10 = -0.8%. Gold rallied on US-Iran de-escalation/dollar weakness. Thesis intact as portfolio diversifier; SL 121 (-3.2% from CMP) appropriate for low-vol ETF."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1735.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 1757.10 vs entry 1700 = +3.4%. Stock at fresh ATH; Europe marine expansion + 500MMT milestone strong. SL 1735 already at +2% locking gains; trail-gap 1.3% below CMP — within tolerance. Stored values match — converting to HOLD to avoid no-op."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 4630.40 vs entry 4575 = +1.2%. Q4 board meeting May 14 — 5 trading sessions away, just outside the 3-session binary-event window. Position size 11 shares × 4575 = ₹50K = 10.9% of capital — within size. Will reassess as event approaches; current SL 4570 (-1.3% from CMP) is acceptable."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6960.00,
      "new_target": 7400.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 7049 vs entry 6900 = +2.2%. Chemours Opteon pact formal announcement TODAY is fresh news catalyst. SL 6960 at +0.9% locking small gain; trail-gap 1.3% below CMP — adequate. Stored values match — converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 845.20 vs entry 838 = +0.9%. Big gap day +9.8% on rail-wagon rally. SL 820 (-3% from CMP) gives volatility room. Q4 results pending in May — monitor. Holding."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 368.70 vs entry 369 = flat. Q4 just printed +31% YoY PAT, fresh ATH. SL 365 (-1% below CMP) is tight — let position breathe at breakeven; don't tighten further until move materializes."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 822.55 vs entry 820 = +0.3%. Q4 print strong (PAT +18%, revenue +22%). At ATH; let setup breathe. SL 815 acceptable."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 1279.10 vs entry 1259 = +1.6%. Q4 PAT +130% YoY beat; Encora deal closed. SL 1260 effectively at breakeven; trail-gap 1.5% — adequate."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 3034 vs entry 3025 = +0.3%. Defense rally +9.2% today. SL 3000 (-1.1% below CMP) — adequate trail-gap. Holding for breakout continuation toward target 3225."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 807.30 vs entry 806 = +0.2%. Q4 record revenue, +10.5% PAT. SL 798 (-1.2% below CMP) — adequate. Hold for target 855."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "LUPIN",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.40,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results TODAY May 7 = binary event TODAY. Per Rule 11, no new entry into binary catalyst within 3 sessions. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "AUROPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "reasoning": "+7.61% gap on day already at 52w high; volume only 0.5x. Apitoria CEO resignation May 4 + Zentiva acquisition leverage overhang per research. Q4 results May 30. Pass on chase."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.35,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results TODAY May 7 — binary event today. Rule 11: no new entry into 0-session binary. Self-flagged urban slowdown + mid-single-digit guidance. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HINDPETRO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.35,
      "reasoning": "Q4 board meeting May 10 = 2 sessions away. Rule 11 binary window. Plus HRRL fire overhang and bearish research sentiment. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "reasoning": "Buyback floor attractive but stock near 52w-high already chased. Already heavily deployed; preserving cash discipline."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 already priced in (+6% on day post-results). Already deployed across multiple themes; no need to chase."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HDFCBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "reasoning": "SBIN Q4 tomorrow could move banking sector — wait. Already have ABCAPITAL + PNBHOUSING in financials cluster."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "NIFTYBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.40,
      "reasoning": "Already heavily deployed in single-name longs that effectively express market beta; ETF would be redundant."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1035 already above entry locking +5% gain; trail-gap 2% below CMP — well-calibrated. No change needed."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Slightly negative; SL 121 has appropriate room for low-vol ETF."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1735 already above entry; +3.4% unrealized; trail-gap 1.3% — at the floor. Don't tighten further."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Board meeting May 14 (5 sessions away). Reassess on Day 21 if event moves into 3-session binary window — disposition then will be exit/trim/tighten per Rule 11."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Chemours pact today is bullish news catalyst confirming thesis. SL 6960 above entry; trail-gap 1.3% adequate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Just opened today on gap rally; SL 820 gives ~3% room appropriate for high-vol breakout."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Flat vs entry; SL 365 (-1% below CMP) already tight — let it work."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 strong; at ATH; SL 815 acceptable. No basis to tighten on +0.3% move."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1260 essentially at breakeven; trail-gap 1.5% — at floor. Holding for upside continuation."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 3000 trail-gap 1.1% below CMP — at floor. Don't tighten further; let breakout run."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 798 trail-gap 1.2% — at floor. Hold."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "LUPIN/DABUR Q4 today and HINDPETRO/HAL Q4 within 3-5 sessions — revisit post-event. BAJAJ-AUTO buyback floor + AUROPHARMA Zentiva decision are second-derivative catalysts. NIFTYBEES considered for redundancy hedge but redundant given 11 single-name longs.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is fully deployed across 11 names with most SLs already trailed above entry — defensive posture is appropriate given the -53.7% experiment-to-date drawdown. Open HFCL BUY @133.50 from 1944 minutes ago is stale — should review/cancel next session if still unfilled and price has moved. HAL Q4 board May 14 needs binary-event disposition by Day 20-21. Sector cluster check: financials (PNBHOUSING + ABCAPITAL + CAMS) ~ within limit; defense (HAL + GRSE + TITAGARH) — three-name cluster, watch closely, no further additions to defense this session per Rule 10."
}
